title: Becton, Dickinson And HP Among 13 Companies Announcing Annual Dividend Increases In The First Half Of November
text: Visa and Exxon Mobil announced dividend increases in October, with Visa increasing its dividend by 15.6% and Exxon Mobil increasing its dividend by 4.4%. Several companies, including AbbVie, American Electric Power, and McDonalds, met or exceeded dividend increase predictions in October. Dividend growth slowed for companies like Amphenol, Black Hills, and Tompkins Financial due to various factors such as the current economic slowdown and flat or lower earnings.

title: Amphenol Corporation (APH) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call October 25, 2023 1:00 PM ET Company Participants Craig Lampo - Chief Financial Officer Adam Norwitt - Chief Executive Officer Conference Call Participants Amit Daryanani - Evercore Chris Snyder - UBS Luke Junk - Baird Andrew Buscaglia - BNP Paribas Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Samik Chatterjee - JPMorgan Mark Delaney - Goldman Sachs Will Stein - Truist Securities Steven Fox - Fox Advisors Matt Sheerin - Stifel Joe Giordano - TD Cowen Operator Hello. And welcome to the third quarter Earnings Conference Call for Amphenol Corporation.

title: Amphenol's (APH) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Down Y/Y
text: Amphenol's (APH) Q3 results reflect sluggish mobile networks, mobile devices, IT datacom, broadband and industrial end markets that hurt top-line growth.

title: Amphenol (APH) Q3 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Amphenol (APH) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended September 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Amphenol forecasts dour Q4 on weak telecom spending
text: Electronic components maker Amphenol forecast fourth-quarter revenue below market estimates on Wednesday, as its clients across industries cut spending in the face of high borrowing costs.

title: Amphenol Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results and Announces Dividend Increase
text: WALLINGFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Amphenol Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results And Announces Dividend Increase.

title: PCTEL INVESTOR ALERT by the Former Attorney General of Louisiana: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of PCTEL, Inc. - PCTI
text: NEW ORLEANS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Former Attorney General of Louisiana Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm of Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (“KSF”) are investigating the proposed sale of PCTEL, Inc. (NasdaqGS: PCTI) to Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH). Under the terms of the proposed transaction, shareholders of PCTEL will receive $7.00 in cash for each share of PCTEL that they own. KSF is seeking to determine whether this consideration and the process that led to it are adequate, or whether t.

title: PCTEL stock soars on acquisition by Amphenol
text: PCTEL Inc shares surged 47% to $6.86 in late-morning trading on Monday after the wireless technology solutions provider announced that it has agreed to be acquired by Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) for $7 per share in cash, or a total consideration of about $139.7 million, representing a more than 50% premium to Friday's closing price.  PCTEL said the deal is expected to close in the fourth quarter of 2023 or early 2024.

title: PCTEL Announces Definitive Agreement to be Acquired by Amphenol Corporation
text: BLOOMINGDALE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PCTEL, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCTI)( “PCTEL” or the “Company”), a leading global provider of wireless technology solutions, today announced that it has reached a definitive agreement to be acquired by Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH), one of the world's largest providers of high-technology interconnect, sensor and antenna solutions. Highlights: Amphenol to acquire all outstanding shares of PCTEL Deal structured as an all cash transaction for total consideration of ap.

title: Amphenol: Excellent Strategic Prowess In A Saturated Market
text: Amphenol operates in a saturated and competitive Electrical Components Subindustry, with China dominating the market. The company has a successful diversification strategy, with a wide product portfolio and presence in various end markets. Amphenol's acquisition strategy has been effective in leading industry consolidation, with inorganic revenue growth contributing significantly to overall growth.

title: 7 Delicious Dividend Tech Stocks for Long-Term Investors
text: While investors favor technology stocks for their growth, they can also be a reliable source of dividend income. Dividend tech stocks offer investors above-market earnings growth and a reliable income stream.

title: Dividend Growth Predictions For 15 Companies Announcing Annual Boosts In October
text: Fifteen long-term dividend growth companies, AbbVie among them, will announce their annual increases in October. Most of the increases will be in the single digit range, with 10%+ increases expected from A. O. Smith, Lincoln Electric and Waste Connections. Microsoft announced a 10% dividend increase in September, and we're still waiting for announcements from McDonald's and Lockheed Martin.
